Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Text Ruling

Appearances via Zoom Conference
Perssia P. Razma, Esq., JCL LAW FIRM, APC (619) 599-8292 prazma@jcl-lawfirm.com Attorney for Plaintiff
Shannon B. Nakabayashi, Esq.., JACKSON LEWIS P.C. (415) 394-9400 Shannon.Nakabayashi@jacksonlewis.com Attorney for Defendants, HILTON MANAGEMENT LLC and HILTON HOTEL EMPLOYER LLC

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHASTA COLLINS AN INDIVIDUAL IN REPRESENTATIVE CAPACITY ON BEHALF OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND FELLOW AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEES'S Motion For Attorneys Fees, Attorneys Expenses, And Service Award

Having reviewed the moving papers and the documents filed therewith, the Court GRANTS Plaintiffs' unopposed Motion For Attorneys Fees, Attorneys Expenses And Service Award. Moving parties to submit a proposed order for the Court's review.

Visiting Judge: John True; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/JT)

Off Calendar Oct-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JACLYN JOYCE, Esq. of Zakay Law Group (tel: 619-255-9047) for Plaintiff.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF SHASTA COLLINS AN INDIVIDUAL IN REPRESENTATIVE CAPACITY ON BEHALF OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND FELLOW AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEES' Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

The Court notes it has received a proposed order with a settlement agreement attached. Counsel Jaclyn Joyce states the agreement has been signed by all parties. The Court inquires as to whether there is anybody present to oppose this motion and the proposed order. No objection stated on the record. Upon conclusion, the Court grants preliminary approval of class action and paga settlement. The Court further schedules a final approval hearing to February 14, 2025, at 9:30 A.M. in department 302.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
